name: device_enable
full_help:
device_enable

Description: 
Enable specified devices

Syntax: 
device_enable  [-quiet] [-verbose] <enable>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <enable>    Enable the given part

Categories: 
Debug

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
